title: Scorched guns: SCG-EXTRA
description: addon for scorched guns 2 mod, adding factions of mobs
body:
**SCG-EXTRA** add factions from base mod lore with brand new enemies to fight with guns

![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/254f304545aa0fe7db33d3e9fb788e7230fd71b8.png)

made possible with Zinc studio

**Zinc studio:** https://discord.gg/pYsscjAE

**3D-artist:** Funado, Nope

**Developer:** Krei, Daragetsu

![first expansion title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/424345d3d2413ed077313008ab5e023c267e0934.png)

New Mechanic

player flare have multiple waves
5 successful head shots on some big enemies trigger stun (recieve double damage)



**First Expansion: Rust And Whale**



[Trailer](https://youtu.be/tAZbg8FZ7vs?si=P3RLeEgX_sqSA32m)



First expansion Rust and Whale adds copper tier gun enemies from RRC(Rust Ridge Collective) faction

and Ocean tier gun enemies from Whlaer(Leviathan syndicate) faction



RRC(Rust Ridge Collective)

Steam-punk apocalypse survivors armored and armed with coppers





RRC Scout: general soldier, cannon fodder
RRC Tallman: long legs to avoid contact with undead
RRC Copper Knight: standard front-line soldier
RRC Scrap Guard: heavy armored and armed with bruiser, will punch you, lacerates the target
RRC Drone: worker unit with weapon (can be stunned)
RRC Arc Psycho: living arc weapon, in consistent pain
RRC Spring Junkie: living nail bomb, lacerates the target
RRC Oppressor: high rank leader, mini boss
RRC Flaming Head: boss, armed with 4 flame thrower! (can be stunned)





Whaler(Leviathan Syndicate)

Fishfolks with guns



 

Fishfolks: fish with legs?
Turtleman: facing backward with bullet proof shell when advancing towards a target, only turn around when firing, you can flipped them on their back with stun grenade
Salmon Riders: fish peaple riding a cool dino salmon
Pufficus: armed with net and mace combo
Tentacliator: blinds you with ink
Glowing Tentacliator: blinds you with ink but it's glowing!
Guardian statue: beautiful statue with forcefully encased Elder Guardian in it, stationary turret enemy, guarding ocean structure with laser
Armored Whale: Whale with tank thread, gem count as weakspot
